validation_smoke.name: platform.kubernetes L3 validation smoke
signals: kubectl diff / helm diff shows only intended changes
rollout status reaches available with new revision
probes pass for new pods before old terminate
RBAC change reviewed against least privilege

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.kubernetes diagnosis smoke
signals: missing or wrong readiness probe causing traffic to unready pods
no resource limits leading to OOMKill or noisy neighbor
Secret mounted as plaintext env var
rollout stuck on crashloop with no rollback
